blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on frontend engineering, design systems, and building things for the web.
blog.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, summary, or tag…

blog.tryBroader: Try a broader keyword, another tag, or clear the filters. The index is intentionally simple, not psychic.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm Blue, a frontend engineer who cares about product surfaces that feel intentional — strong hierarchy, quieter motion, durable code, and content that still makes sense when the project stops being a toy.
about.work: I work at the intersection of frontend engineering, product thinking, and written communication. My favorite projects sit between editorial design and product infrastructure.

common.navHint: Minimal, quiet, and finally not muddy.
